creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This has got to be some kind of joke.  Monkeys in the Amazon basin 
have learned to use rawrite.  African termites have learned it. 
Even certain species of bacteria can get it right 3 times out of 4. 

If this simple utility is giving the user "serious" problems 
then I can only recommend relocation to a quaker village and a vow 
to eliminate all reliance on technology as viable solutions.
